exam_title: English Grammar - Present Continuous & Past Simple Evaluation

questions.question: Right now, I ...... cooking dinner for some friends.
She ...... a book at the moment - she's reading a magazine.
Don't enter that classroom; the students ...... an exam right now.
Listen! What language ...... they speaking over there?
Look at the window! A new hospital ...... in the town center this month.
The software files ...... to our secure server right now.
Why ...... you wearing a heavy coat today? It's very warm.
Anne and Andrew ...... the new James Bond film this evening.
The marketing team ...... a brand new strategy at this moment.
Account details ...... by our technical support as we speak.
I ...... very busy at work last week.
